title: Premium Baby Toys for 6-18 Months, 8 in 1 Montessori Toys Set, Educational Learning Toys for Toddlers 1-3 Years Old Trendy Babies Gifts for Boys & Girls
features: 8-in-1 MONTESSORI TOY SET: Our exclusive toy set includes stacking blocks, stacking rings, stacking cups, pull string toys and sensory box toys, wooden sorting toys, car toys. It helps babies' growth by developing their ability to distinguish colors and perceive shapes, improving fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, creativity, problem solving, and logical thinking.

100% SAFE FOR CHILDREN: Our baby playsets are made from premium materials so you can choose with confidence. They have undergone comprehensive safety testing and are BPA free, ensuring that each product is safe for babies and suitable for ages 6 months and up.

SORTING & STACKING TOYS SET: This contains different themed stacking activities, stacking blocks & stacking rings & stacking cups and wooden geometric stacking puzzles. Create a variety of spatial sorting combinations through different shapes, colors, and quantities. Improve your child's perception of colors, shapes, develop counting and logical thinking and spatial ordering skills, which provides an open-ended opportunity to stimulate your child's imagination.

MULTI-SENSORY EXPLORATION & TEETHING TOYS: Cylindrical exploration box, spaceship shaped pull toys and press power car toys specially designed for toddlers to fulfill multi-sensory training needs. The fun starts from sight to fingertip touch, through pulling, pressing, chewing, shaking and stacking, while developing their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination, stimulating their curiosity, and a variety of different textured shapes can increase sensory perception.

BEST GIFT FOR TODDLERS: Our baby toys set is designed to gradually develop and improve your child's observation and concentration skills through sensory intervention. It is a perfect choice of gift for boys and girls for any occasion such as birthday, Easter, Christmas, Children's Day and New Year's Day. They are also widely used as children's early learning aids.
description: From the brand Previous page LUCKFUTURE is a brand started in 2015 with a unique concept of enlightenment. Our products include children's toys as well as teaching aids and are sold in over 100 countries worldwide. We are committed to improving the way children grow up through continuous innovation and development of high-quality products, and strive to create intelligent, enjoyable parenting styles. Next page
